'''Nilo''' was a male [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who was stationed on [[Garos IV]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Whispers in the Dark|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
*{{JournalCite|3|Mission to Zila|reprint=1}}
*{{JournalCite|4|Shadows of Darkness|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
*{{JournalCite|12|Betrayal by Knight|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
